title: pelecyphora dasyacantha subsp. dasyacantha
intro: Pelecyphora dasyacantha subsp. dasyacantha, commonly known as the "Living Rock," is a species of cactus native to Mexico. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, pain, and inflammation. The health benefits of Pelecyphora dasyacantha subsp. dasyacantha include its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, as well as its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and proper usage.
